title: SCHISM Adapter Configuration
description: Configuration for OpenLimno's SCHISM subprocess wrapper. SPEC v0.5 §6.1, ADR-0002. M0 stub; M3 expands.

lts_version.description: Pinned SCHISM LTS version (e.g. v5.10.x). M0 selects.

executable.description: Path to schism executable; conda-forge schism preferred

param_overrides.description: Pass-through overrides for param.nml fields (use sparingly)
